notes: Installs ok, including directx , Games for windows, and Physx. The key Actives ok. Launcher starts ok. Splash screen. Game windows opens with Capcom banner and music. Then nothing but a black window.
title: Dark Void™

notes:
This game behaves insanely. I thought it was just a regular crash at startup, but while sometimes it'd make it to the Capcom logo and freeze, sometimes it'd go to the Unreal logo.

I decided to engage PROTON_NO_D3D10 and... it booted! Right up and into menus, performed fine through cutscenes and the first mission. I was excited! There was a long black screen after the second cutscene and then my entire screen turned artifacted pink, such that I had to reboot. That was the only time I got the game to boot and how magical.
title: Dark Void™
